profile.setupBody: Add your public Explorer details before viewing profile stats and activity.

editProfile.title: Edit Profile
editProfile.isPublicDescription: Allow other explorers to see your profile
editProfile.profilePictureHelper: JPG, PNG, GIF, or WebP up to 5 MB.
editProfile.newPasswordPlaceholder: Min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, digit, symbol

errors.nameLength: Name must be between 3 and 100 characters.
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.bioTooLong: Bio must be 500 characters or less.
errors.newPasswordWeak: Must contain uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character.
errors.newPasswordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.network: No internet connection. Please check your network.
errors.server: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
errors.emailTaken: That email is already in use.

error.unauthorized: Session expired. Please log in again.
error.validation: Please check your input and try again.
error.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
error.network: No internet connection. Please check your network.
error.server: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
error.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
error.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
error.profileSetupRequired: Complete your Explorer profile before continuing.
